<!-- One line: the situation and forces that make a decision necessary. -->

<!-- One line: the decision made, stated plainly and implementation-agnostically. -->

<!-- One line: the resulting outcomes and trade-offs, positive and negative. -->

## 4. Alternatives Considered
<!-- One line: the other options weighed and why they were not chosen. -->
